title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOLDS PRESS MEET ON SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION (SIR) 2026
content:
144/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 4th  June 2026: The District Election Officer of Lawngtlai, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, held a press briefing at his office chamber today at 2:00 PM regarding the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Roll 2026.

During the meeting, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga informed that Booth Level Officers (BLOs) are currently distributing Enumeration Forms door-to-door throughout the district. For the three Assembly Constituencies in Lawngtlai District—36-Tuichawng (ST), 37-Lawngtlai West (ST), and 38-Lawngtlai East (ST)—Electoral Registration Officers (EROs) and Assistant Electoral Registration Officers (AEROs) have been appointed, and under their supervision, BLOs are carrying out the distribution of Enumeration Forms to every household.As of now, the distribution progress stands at 65% in Tuichawng Assembly Constituency, 77% in Lawngtlai West, and 62% in Lawngtlai East. He stated that the distribution of Enumeration Forms is scheduled to be completed by 28 June 2026.

The District Election Officer further stated that the ongoing Special Intensive Revision of Electoral Roll 2026 aims to prepare a fresh and updated Electoral Roll, ensuring that all eligible citizens are properly included. He emphasized that every effort is being made to ensure the accuracy and completeness of the Electoral Roll.Highlighting the importance of safeguarding the Electoral Roll from any possible inclusion of ineligible foreign nationals, he stressed the need for greater vigilance during the revision process. He also underscored the importance of cooperation from civil society organizations, churches, media personnel, and the people of Lawngtlai District, and appealed to all stakeholders to extend their full support to election officials in the successful conduct of SIR 2026.

The District Election Officer was accompanied by Shri David Lalrinawma, Electoral Registration Officer (ERO), and Shri Collin Hlycho, Election Officer.

title: Women & Child Development Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n Lungleia Working Women's Hostel sak lai mek a enfiah
content:

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 4:Tukin zingkar khan Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Lunglei Ramthar Venga Working Women's Hostel (WWH) sak lai mek chu a hmunah kalin a enfiah.

Women & Child Development Minister hi Lunglei High Powered Committee (HPC) Vice Chairman Pu V. Malsawmtluanga bakah, Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma, Councillor Pi Malsawmkimi Khawlhring leh official-te'n an ṭawiawm a. Hna thawktute'n lo dawngsawngin, building sak lai an en ho bakah, an hna thawh dinhmun leh an harsatnate Minister hi an lo hrilhfiah.

Working Women's Hostel hi hmeichhia mahni in luma awm lo va, hmun danga hna thawkte him leh dam taka an hna thawhna hmuna an kal theih nan leh nu nau pawmte pawhin thlamuang taka an kalsan theih nana nau awmna (creche) pawh awm tel thei tura Ministry of Women & Child Development-in a ruahman a ni a. Lungleia WWH hi SASCI Project hnuaia sum hmuh aṭanga sak niin, mi 50 leng thei tura sak tur a ni a. A pum pui sak zawh nan hian cheng vaibelchhe 14.09 ruahman niin, tunah hian 1st Installment cheng vaibelchhe 9.29 dawn tawh a ni a. Public Works Department (PWD) enkawlna hnuaiah AIE Construction, Tuikhuahtlang te'n a sak hna hi an thawk.

Building sak hna hi April 14, 2025 aṭang khan bul ṭan niin, duh angin hna a kal chak thei lo va. Hna thawktute chuan in sakna bungrua, a bikin rawra lak khawmna kawngah harsatna an tawh thu sawiin, chuti chung chuan theih tawp an chhuah thu a sawi a. Kum khat chhunga sak zawh tura ruahman chu an sak zawh a beisei awm loh chungin, Minister chuan ṭha tak leh a rang thei ang bera sa zo tura hma la turin a chah a ni.

title: NOTIFICATION BY HIGHER & TECHNICAL EDUCATION ON SMATEE 2026 PROVISIONAL RESULT
content:
143/2026-2027

Aizawl the 4th June, 2026:The Provisional results of all candidates who appeared for the State Medical and Technical Entrance Examination (SMATEE) 2026, conducted by the Mizoram State Council for Technical Education (MSCTE) on 5th May, 2026 (Tuesday), are hereby published in order of merit, regardless of category. The results are also available on the website:https://dhte.mizoram.gov.in. Any complaint concerning the SMATEE 2026 provisional results and request for correction of candidates' credentials should be submitted to the Joint Director (Technical), Technical Wing, H&TE, Chaltlang, Aizawl, within one week from the date of publication. The final results will be released after addressing any complaint received.

The answer keys of SMATEE 2026 were published vide office order No.45011/2/2025-JDT(HTE)/132 dated Aizawl, the 7th May, 2026. They were made available on the office website and displayed on the notice boards of the Directorate of Higher & Technical Education and Technical Wing Office. During the challenge window from 7th May to 14th May, 2026, no challenges against the answer keys were received.

The order of merit list has been prepared with specific tie-break rules for cases where candidates achieve equal total marks (Clause 12 of Information Brochure). These rules are as follows:

(a) Candidates with higher marks in Biology (for PCB) or Mathematics (for PCM) will be ranked higher.

(b) If the marks in Biology (for PCB) or Mathematics (for PCM) are equal, the candidates' marks in Chemistry will be used to determine their rank.

(c) If the marks in both Biology (for PCB) or Mathematics (for PCM) and Chemistry remain equal, the candidates' marks in Physics will be considered to establish their rank.

(d) If the marks in Biology (for PCB) or Mathematics (for PCM), Chemistry, and Physics are still equal, preference will be given to the older candidates.(e) If a resolution cannot be reached after applying the criteria in (a),(b),(c), and (d), the tied candidates will receive the same rank.

The OMR answer sheets for SMATEE 2026 have been graded by machine, and as a result, applications for re-evaluation or re-checking will not be entertained in accordance with the rule outlined in clause 9 of the Information Brochure. However, a provision is available to obtain a photocopy of the OMR answer sheets, subject to the conditions outlined in clause 11 of the Information Brochure. The date and time for online choice filling will be announced on the official website,https://dhte.mizoram.gov.inin due course.

OVERALL ABSTRACT for SMATEE 2026:

1. No. of Candidates : 495 (Male) + 1459 (Female) = 19542. No. of Candidates appeared : 450 (Male) + 1360 (Female) = 18103. No. of Candidates absent : 45 (Male) + 99 (Female) = 1444. No. of Candidates Expelled : NIL

title: SMATEE 2026 PROVISIONAL RESULT
content:
839/2026-2027

Aizawl the 4th June, 2026:Mizoram State Council for Technical Education (MSCTE) in May ni 5, 2026 (Thawhlehni)-a State Medical and Technical Entrance Examination (SMATEE) 2026 a buatsaih a candidate zawng zawngte Provisional Result chu an mark hmuh that dan indawt (merit list) in June ni 3, 2026 khan a tichhuak. Result hi website:https://dhte.mizoram.gov.in. ah en theih a ni a. SMATEE 2026 provisional result chungchangah sawiselna nei emaw tihdikna siam duh chuan result chhuah ni atanga ni 10 ral hma in Joint Director (Technical), Technical Wing, H&TE, Chaltlang, Aizawl ah complaint thehluh tur a ni. Complaint dawn te bawhzui fel a nih hnu ah final result chhuah a ni ang.

Office order No.45011/2/2025-JDT(HTE)/132 dated Aizawl, the 7th May, 2026 hmangin SMATEE 2026 Answer Keys tihchhuah a ni a, hei pawh hi office website ah leh Directorate of Higher & Technical Education and Technical Wing Office-a Notice Board ah tarchhuah a ni. May ni 7 - ni 14, 2026 inkara challenge window hawn chhung khan answer key chungchangah 'challenge' engmah dawn a ni lo.

Merit List hi mark hmuh that dan indawt a siam a nih laiin hmun thenkhatah candidate zingah total mark inzat chiah chiah an awm thei a. Hetiang dinhmun a thleng a nih chuan a hnuaia 'tie-break rules' hi hman thin a ni:

(a) Biology (for PCB) emaw Mathematics (for PCM) emaw a mark hmu tha zawk chu a rank a sang zawk ang.

(b) Biology (for PCB) emaw Mathematics (for PCM) emaw a an mark hmuh a inang chiah chiah a nih chuan, Chemistry-a an mark hmuhin an rank a hril ang.

(c) Biology (for PCB) emaw Mathematics (for PCM) leh Chemistry-a an mark hmuh a inang zel a nih chuan, Physics-a an mark hmuhin an rank a hril ang.

(d) Biology (for PCB) emaw Mathematics (for PCM) leh Chemistry bakah Physics-a an mark hmuh a inang zel a nih chuan, candidate kum tam zawk (upa zawk) duhsak zawk a ni ang.

(e) Criteria (a),(b),(c), leh (d) hmanga an dinhmun chinfel theih a nih loh zel chuan tied candidate-te hian rank inang an nei ang.

SMATEE 2026 a OMR answer sheet te hi khawl a endik (graded) a ni a; Information Brochure a inkaihhruaina clause 9 in a sawi angin re-evaluation emaw re-checking tih a ni tawhlo ang. Amaherawhchu Information Brochure clause 11 in a sawi angin OMR sheet photocopy chu dilchhuah theih a ni a. Online choice filling tih hun tur chu official websitehttps://dhte.mizoram.gov.inkaltlangin hriattirna la chhuah a ni ang.

title: ECI Deputy Director (Media) Apurva Kumar Singh Interacts with Mizoram Media on SIR 2026
content:
142/2026-2027

Aizawl, June 4, 2026:Shri Apurva Kumar Singh, IIS, Deputy Director (Media), Election Commission of India (ECI), interacted with media persons at the Aizawl Press Club this afternoon. During the interaction, he explained the objectives and implementation process of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026.

Shri Apurva Kumar Singh stated that SIR 2026 is a major nationwide exercise aimed at revising and updating the electoral rolls to ensure that they remain accurate, clean and reliable. He said that the exercise is being conducted in different phases across the country, and Mizoram is among the States covered under Phase III, where the revision process is currently underway.

He informed that the Enumeration Phase in Mizoram commenced on May 30, 2026. Booth Level Officers (BLOs) are presently carrying out house-to-house visits to distribute, collect and verify Enumeration Forms. The exercise is being undertaken to ensure that all eligible Indian citizens are included in the electoral roll and that no eligible voter is left out.

Shri Singh further stated that the Election Commission has deployed a large number of field-level election officials across the country for the successful conduct of SIR 2026. In Mizoram, BLOs, Booth Level Agents (BLAs) appointed by various political parties, and other election officials are actively conducting door-to-door outreach and assisting electors. He added that the entire exercise is being carried out in accordance with the provisions of the Constitution of India and the relevant laws governing the preparation and revision of electoral rolls.

Sharing his observations on the progress of SIR 2026 in Mizoram, Shri Singh said that he was pleased with the manner in which the exercise is being implemented in the State. He also mentioned that he had visited Reiek earlier in the day to witness the field-level activities. He expressed appreciation to the Chief Electoral Officer and his team, District Election Officers, Electoral Registration Officers, BLOs, media personnel and all others involved in the exercise for their dedication and hard work. He also appealed to the public to submit their Enumeration Forms within the prescribed timeline and to fill up the forms carefully and accurately.

Responding to various questions from media representatives, Shri Singh elaborated on voter eligibility, enrolment and correction procedures, the registration of newly eligible voters in the electoral roll, and the important role played by political parties in SIR 2026. Emphasizing the importance of widespread public awareness for the successful implementation of SIR 2026, he called upon the media to continue extending their full cooperation to election officials in disseminating accurate information to the public.

title: ECI-a Deputy Director (Media) Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan SIR 2026 chungchangah Mizoram media te a kawm
content:
838/2026-2027

Aizawl, June 4, 2026:Election Commission of India (ECI)-a Deputy Director (Media), Pu Apurva Kumar Singh, IIS chuan vawiin chawhnu khan Aizawl Press Club-ah thuthar thehdarhtute a kawm a. Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 chungchang leh a kalphung te a sawi fiah.

Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan SIR 2026 hi India ram pum huap electoral roll ennawnna leh siamthatna hna pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, electoral roll dik, felfai leh rintlak siam tumna beihpui a ni, a ti a. He hna hi ram pum huapin phase hrang hrangin kalpui a ni a. Mizoram chu Phase III-na ah telin, State dangte rualin hmalakna hi kalpui mek a ni, a ti.

Mizoram-ah Enumeration Phase chu May 30, 2026 atang khan tan a ni a, Booth Level Officer (BLO) te chuan in tinah kalin Enumeration Form sem, khawn khawm leh enfiahna hna an thawk mek a. India khua leh tui, vote nei thei zawng zawng te electoral roll-ah an tel vek theih nan leh tumah hmaih palh an awm lohna tura tan lak mek a ni, tih a sawi.

Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan Election Commission chuan SIR 2026 kalpui turin ram pum huapin field-level election official tam tak ruat an ni tih a sawi bawk a. Mizoram-ah pawh BLO te, political party tin atanga ruat Booth Level Agent (BLA) te leh election official dangte chuan in tinah campaign leh mipuite tanpui hna an thawk mek a. Hei hi India Constitution leh electoral roll siam dan tur Danpui hrang hrang zawm chungin kalpui a ni, a ti bawk.

Mizoram-a SIR 2026 kalpui mek a nih dan a taka a rawn hmuh thu leh, vawiin chawhma lamah Reiek an tlawh thu sawiin, Chief Electoral Officer leh a thawhpuite, District Election Officer te, Electoral Registration Officer te, BLO te, media mi te leh thawktu dang zawng zawngte thawhrimna avangin lawmthu a sawi a. Mipuite pawh Enumeration Form an thehlut hun chhunga thehlut ngei tur leh, Enumeration Form te uluk taka fill up turin a ngen bawk.

Media aiawhte zawhna hrang hrang chhangin, vote neih theih dan te, enrolment leh siamthat hna kalpui dan te, kumtling thar te E-Roll-a an inthun thar dan te leh SIR 2026-a political party te pawimawhzia chungchangte a sawi a. SIR 2026 felfai taka kalpui turin mipui mimirah puanzar tam a pawimawh thu sawiin, media ten theihtawp chhuaha election official te thawhpui turin a sawm a ni.

title: Sports & Youth Services Department changtu Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Empowering Mizoram Sports Awareness Campaign chu Aizawl Municipal Corporator leh  Local Council hruaitute a hmanpui

Aizawl; 4th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Sports & Youth Services Department changtu Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Mizoram Infiamna kawnga hmasawnna a awm theih nan leh vengchhung hrang hrangah Infiamna pawimawhna hriattir nan, "Empowering Mizoram Sports (EMS) Awareness Campaign" chu Aizawl Municipal Corporator leh Local Council te Administrative Training Institute (ATI) Auditorium, MINECO-ah a hmanpui.

Minister chuan vawiin  an hun hman chu Mizoramin Sports lama hma a sawn theihna tura ni chhinchiahthlak tak a nih thu a sawi a. Vengchhung hruaitute hnenah chuan Mizoram Bana Kaih scheme 2024 hnuaia EMS kalpui dan chu khawtlang hruaituten an hriatthiam a, hma an lak pui chuan Mizoramin Sports-ah hma  nasa taka a sawn belh theih thu a sawi. Minister chuan National Games-ah Mizoram dinhmun chu duhthu a sam tawkloh thu leh International level-ah, a  bik takin Olympic thlirin India ram  dinhmun pawh a hniam hle a. Chutihrualin, Mizo zingah Sports-a tui tak tak tam hle mahse, India level-ah an la thlen san loh  avangin ko  thlak nan EMS chu din a nih thu a sawi.

Minister chuan EMS hnuaiah hian Sports discipline thlan bik neiin hmalak mek a ni a, heng discipline thlante hi Olympic 2036 hmathlira ruahman a ni, a ti. EMS hnuaiah hian naupang kum 8-15 inkar theihna neite zawnchhuaha, tel tir tum a ni. Minister chuan," Jeremy Lalrinnunga’n tun dinhmuna a thlenna ang hi Mizoa naupang dangteah hmuh leh kan duh a ni", a ti. Minister chuanInspire Institute of Sport (IIS)nen thawhhona thuthlung siam a ni dawn tih a sawi bawk. Vawiina lo kal Vengchhung hruaitute an venga naupangte theihna leh thiamna Sports lamah chherchhuaktu ni turin a chah bawk a ni.

Minister chuan Aizawl Municipal Corporator-te leh Local Council hruaitute telloin an thawh theih loh thu sawiin, mahni vengchhung ṭheuhah tan la tur leh theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a, "Corporators leh local council-te telloin kan che thei lo. Olympic 2036, India rama thleng tura ruahmanah Mizo Infiammi 1 tal an luh ve kan duh a ni" tiin,  vawiina kalkhawmte chu naupangte theihna hai chhuaktu leh chherchhuaktu ni turin a chah a ni.

Empowering Mizoram Sports chungchang:

Mizoram sawrkar chuan Mizorama infiammite theihna chu hriain, kum 2036-a Olympic lo awm tur thlirin 'The Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Policy 2024' hnuaiah 'Empowering Mizoram Sports (EMS)' chu a duang a. He hmalakna hi Olympic 2036 bakah khawvel pum huap inelna hrang hrangah Mizoram-in India ram aiawh tur infiammi tam thei ang ber a chher chhuah theihna tura hmalakna a ni.

EMS thiltum bulpui:

1. Mizoram khaw hrang hranga kum 8-15 inkar infiamnaa theihna bik neite zawn chhuah.

2. Chung mite chu intihsiakna hrang hrang leh development camp hmanga thlitfim.

3. Hma an sawn zel dan tur felfai tak duansak a, national leh international level inelna hrang hranga hmachhawn thei tura buatsaih

4. Kum 2036 Olympic-a India aiawha tel thei tur khawpa Mizo thalai eng emaw zat chher chhuah.

title: P&E MINISTER PU F. RODINGLIANA'N HLIAPPUIAH PM-RKVY-DPR 2025-2026 HNUAIA SAPTHEI CHIN HAWNNA HUN A HMANPUI
content:
836/2026-2027

Saitual, the 4th June, 2026: Vawiin khan Hliappui Auditorium-ah, Sawrkar laipui scheme PM-RKVY-DPR 2025-2026 hnuaia sapthei chin hawnna hun hman a ni a, Pu F. Rodingliana, Hon'ble Minister, Power & Electricity, Commerce & Industries, etc chu khuallian niin hun a hmanpui a, tanpuina te a sem chhuak nghal bawk a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian Minister Pu F. Rodingliana chuan thu a sawi a, Sawrkar laipui scheme tha tak hnuaia Hliappui leh Pawlrangah te sapthei chin kalpui a ni thei tur chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Sawrkarin kuthnathawktute tan an thlai thar hralhna tur “market” a siam sak chu a vanneihthlak hle bawk a ni, a ti. Khuallian chuan kalkhawmte chu sawrkarin an banah a kaih dawn avangin thu mai mai tur an ni lo tih a sawi a, hma lam pana ke pen zel tura fuihin, department lama hotuten theih tawp an chhuah a, kan ram hmasawnna leh dinchhuahna chu kuthnathawktute kutah a innghat thui hle a ni, a ti bawk.

Minister chuan a thlawna pawisa dawn rilru paih a hun tawh tih sawiin, tuna an pawisa dawn te chu a thlawn a ni lo tih hria a, an dinchhuahna tura Sawrkarina tanpuina sumfai a pek lawkna a ni tih hre thar leh turin kalkhawmte chu a chah a. Kan pawisa dawn te chu a hmanna tur loa kan hman chuan eirukna a ni tih sawiin, mahni pawimawhna zawn theuha theih tawp chhuah turin kalkhawmte chu a fuih a, a duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Hliappuiah hian hamthatna dawngtu mi 51, Pawlrangah mi 39 an awm a, he scheme hian tanpuina sumfai bakah hmanrua leh damdawi hrang hrang te a keng tel dawn a ni.

Vawiin inkhawm hi Pu C.H Lalmuanpuia, Director, Horticulture chuan a kai hruai a, Lt. Lalrammawia, Hliappui chuan hunserh a hmang a ni. Thusawi hi khuallian Minister Pu F. Rodingliana bakah Hliappui VC aiawh leh Pawlrang VC aiawh atang tein ngaihthlak a ni a, Pu Jacob Lalmalsawma, DHO chuan technical report a pe bawk a  ni. Pu Vanlalthara Colney, BHO, Ngopa Block chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan 'Green Mizoram Day' chu kum tin hman thin a nih angin kuminah pawh urhsun taka hman a tul hle a ti a. Khawvel sik leh sa inthlak danglam zelah thing leh mau bakah tuihna, nungchate humhalh leh venhim kawngah thanharh a hun hle a ni tiin, a taka thingphun mai bakah thang leh tharte thinlungah pawh kan phun ngheh a tul a, thingphun mai duhtawk lova a enkawl zui lamah pawh nasa taka tan kan lak a ngai a ni a ti. Hemi kawngah hian sawrkar, NGO leh mipuite tanho zel a pawimawh tak zet a, thing leh mau, ramngaw leh tuihnate humhalh kawngah theihtawp chhuahpui turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

He thutkhawm ah hian Member Secretary Pu Lalnunthanga, DFO in report leh Agenda sawihawnna leh sawi zauna hun a hmang a, Green Mizoram Day puala inkhawm hi DC Conference Hall-ah neih nise, thing tiak phunna hmun atan National High Way (NH-6) ah neih nise tihte leh Programme tuldang te sawiho a ni. He thutkhawmah hian Khawzawl District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Member-te an tel kim tha hle a, Chairman Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hun hi a khar a ni.

Kumin 'Green Mizoram Day 2026' hi June Ni 11 dar 10:00 am ah neih a ni dawn a, Thupui atan 'Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni (Trees are green gold, The roots of all life)' tih hman a ni ang.

title: PM EKTA MALL CHUNGCHANGA TOURISM DEPARTMENT THUCHHUAH
content:
834/2026-2027

Dated: Aizawl the 4thJune, 2026:Mizoram Tourism Department chuan PM Ekata Mall chungchangah a hnuai ami ang hian mipui hriat tur thuchhuah an siam:

Tun hnaiah social media-a PM Ekta Mall chungchanga thuthang dik lo tam tak awmin mipuite a ti-chiai a, hei hi Tourism Department chuan pawi a tiin, thuchiang zawk mipuite’n an lo hriat nan he thuchhuah hi buatsaih a ni.

PM Ekta Mall, Chawnpui Venga sak mek hi India Prime Minister-in inlungrualna tha zawk India ramin a neih theih nan leh One District One Product (ODOP) chawisan nana project a duan zinga pakhat a ni.

He project hi India ram State dangahte chuan Commerce & Industries Department-in an khawih laiin, Sorkar hmasa khan Tourism Department chu hma la turin a lo ruat a ni.

PM Ekta Mall atana sum ruahman hi Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade of India-DPIIT, Government of India atanga sanction a nih theih nan ni 24.08.2023-ah DPR submit a ni a, project cost hi Rs. 127.00 crore niin ni 12.03.2024 khan sanction a ni. Hemi rual hian 50% i.e Rs 63.50 crore dawn nghal a ni bawk.

He project tihlawhtling tur hian harsatna tam tak sut kian chhoh mek a ni a. DPR ringawt pawh vawi thum (3) lai submit a ni nghe nghe a, a chhan chu:-

1. Ni 24.08.2023-a DPR submit-ah hian, a sakna tur hmun atan FCI godown, Zuangtui ruahman a ni a, ni 12.03.2024-a sanction hmuh a nih hnuah FCI godown hi sawn chhuah theih a ni lo tih hriat a ni.

2. DPR pahnihna hi Tourist Home, Zonuam-ah siam a ni a. Tourism Department-in Tourist Home hi Pu C. Lalfakzuala hnenah date 06.02.2017 atanga chhiara kum sawm (10) chhung atana outsource a lo nih vangin, ani hian court-ah Department a khing a, chuvangin hmun dang zawn a tul leh ta a ni.

3. Nasa taka sawrkar ram remchang dang zawn a nih hnuah, Printing & Stationery Department ram, Chawnpui atan DPR pathumna (3) siamin submit leh a ni. Hei hi tuna a awmna hmun hi a ni.

A project hi a len tham deuh avangin, tha zawk leh mumal taka kalpui a nih theih nan dan leh hrai leh inkaihhruaina felfai tak nei thlap Central Public Sector Undertaking (CPSU) pahnih rawih an ni a. IIFCL Projects Ltd. (CPSU under Ministry of Finance) hi Project Monitoring Unit (PMU), project vil leh endik (Supervision & Monitoring) atan rawih niin, HITES Ltd. (CPSU under Ministry of Health & Family Welfare)-te hi Executing Agency an ni thung.

Hetianga CPSU pahnih rawih hi project lian tham deuhah chuan an tih fo thin a ni a, AIIMS Hospital hmun hrang hrang - Guwahati, Rewari, Gorakhpur, Bhatinda etc. saknaah pawh HITES Ltd. te hi Executing Agency niin RITES Ltd. (CPSU under Ministry of Railways) te’n endik hna (supervision and monitoring) an thawk thung a ni.

HITES Ltd. te hi RIPANS building, Zemabawk satute an ni a, an hnathawh tawhte enin an ni hi rintlak a ngaih an ni. IIFCL Projects Ltd. te hi Ministry of Finance hnuaia PSU an nih avangin leh PM Ekta Mall Project hi Finance Ministry-in DPIIT kaltlanga a monitor reng avangin, an ni hi PMU atan ruat an ni bawk.

IIFCL Projects Ltd. te enpuina hnuaiah HITES Ltd. hian contractor thlang turin tender an chhuah a. An contractor thlan chhuah chuan bank guarantee lem an lo pek avangin tender hi cancel niin, tender an chhuah nawn leh a. Tuna contractor SPG Infra Projects Pvt Ltd. te hi contract award an ni ta a ni. Contract award hi ni 18.07.2025 khan pek an ni.

Heng Party hrang hrangte nena thawhhona Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) kan sign hi Law & Judicial Department leh Finance Department ten uluk taka an zirchian hnua vetting an pek vek a ni. He MoA mil hian HITES Ltd. hnenah engagement order chhuah rual in Project Execution Fund atan an contract amount atanga 25% release a ni a. Hmasawnna a awm belh hnuah 20% release leh a ni.

Hei hi project kalphung pangngai a ni a. Project lian dangahte pawh Finance Department-in Implementing Department, entirnan PWD, ZIDCO ah sum a hlawmin a pe chhuak a, anni hian an physical progress milin contractor-ah an pe chhuak leh thin a ni. Hetiang chiah hian MTDA hian agreement milin HITES Ltd. ah Rs 45.92 Cr (TDS leh Income Tax paih hnu) hi a pe chhuak a, HITES Ltd te hian Project Execution Fund atana sum kan release hi HITES Ltd. leh IIFCL Projects Ltd contractor-te Bill leh an hnathawh an lo endik vek hnuah contractor-te hnenah an hnathawh mil zelin an release ve leh tur a ni. Mizoram sorkarin contractor te hnena bill release ah hian thuneihna a nei tawh lo.

Vawiin thleng hian contractor SPG Infra Projects Ltd. te hnena HITES Ltd. in sum a release tawh zat hi Rs. 1.46 crore a ni. Hei hi sum release tawh Rs. 63.50 crore atanga chhutin 2.30% chauh a la ni a, tuna a taka hnathawh tawh (physical progress) hi 18% a ni thung.

Utilization Certificate hi 1st installment atanga 75% kan hman zawh hnuah theh luh tur a ni a. 2nd installment hi 15th Finance Commission hun ral hmaa hnuh chhuah ngei a tul avangin UC hi zuk pek lailawk a ni a, Financial Year 2026-27 ah budget provision a awm leh dawn tih hriat hnuah UC hi ennawn leh niin, ni 12.02.2026 khan Finance Department-ah submit leh a ni. A hmaa UC submit tawhte pawh he UC dated 12.02.2026 hian a luahlan (supersede) vek a ni. Ardeco Design Build, HITES Ltd, IIFCL Projects Ltd te hnena sum release leh MTDA Administrative Cost atana sum hman belhkhawm hi Rs. 56.78 crore niin, chu chu 1st installment a 89.40% a ni a. Hemi mil hian UC hi siam a ni.

Contract Award hi EPC mode a pek a ni a. An drawing leh estimate hi IIT Guwahati in vetting an tih hnuah chauh pawm theih a ni. Hetiang anga design siam vek a nih hnuah hian seismic zone-V atanga seismic zone–VI a puan kan lo nih leh tak avangin design leh drawing tih that leh vek niin, IIT Guwahati a vetting lak chhung pawh hi thla thum (3) lai a ni.

Permit tul chi hrang hrang leh NOC-te tihfel a nih hnuah leh Printing & Stationery Department staff quarter-te thiah fel a nih hnu in, ni 23.08.2025 khan Chief Minister zahawm takin sak tanna tur lung a phum ta a ni.

Tarlan tawh angin a hmun chungchangah harsatna tam tak kan paltlang tawh a, tunah hian electric ban sawn leh a hnuai lam atanga bungraw lak luhna tur kawngte pawh chinfel ngai zingah a la awm a ni.

Hna hi chak lehzuala thawh a nih theih nan theihtawpin Department chuan hma a la a, hnathawktute pawh nasa taka nawrin shift hnih (chhun leh zan)-a thawkin theihtawp kan chhuah mek a ni. Hmun awih taka hna hi thawh a nih avangin a foundation stage-ah hian hnathawh a langsar thei lo va, a lei seh chin a pelh hnuah chuan hmasawnna langsar zawka hmuh beisei a ni.

PM Ekta Mall sak chungchangah hian State tinte kan thlen chin a inang lo a, State thenkhatte chu a hmun tur la ti fel lo te an awm laiin, a thente chu zo fel tawh te pawh an awm a. Keini Mizoram pawh a hmun vawi thum lai kan thlak avangin State dangte aiin hna kan thawk tan tlai a, harsatna hriat lawk loh hmachhawn tur a awm tawh lo a nih chuan kum 2027 chawhma lamah chuan zawh theih beisei a ni.

He project hi uluk taka duan a nih angin theihtawp leh fimkhur taka hmalak mek zel a ni a, Mizoram mipuite’n lo ngaichang a, lo chiai lo turin Tourism Department chuan a ngen a ni.

title: RD&AD MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA’N N. MUALCHENG KHUA-AH ' PANCHAYAT BHAWAN (VC HOUSE)' SAK THAR A HAWNG
content:
833/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 4thJune 2026:Vawiin khan RD&AD Minister Prof. Lalnilawma’n Rastrya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) hnuaia  cheng  nuaih 20 senga sak N. Mualcheng khuaa 'Panchayat Bhawan (VC House) sak thar chu a hawng. RD&AD Minister hi Hrangturzo Bialtu MLA Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte-in a tawiawm a ni.

Minister Prof.Lalnilawma chuan N. Mualcheng khuaten VC House(Panchayat Bhawan) thar tha leh changtlung tak an nei ta chu a lawmpui thu a sawi a, sum estimate sang vaklo-a hetianga khawtlang tana ro (asset) tha, sa thei tura an thawh ho thatnaah khawtlang   hruaitute fakin, a enkawl zuina lamah pawh theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a chah nghal a. VC hlawhte pawh tih pun a nih nan en hoa, zirchian chhoh mek a nih thu sawiin politics tui nu tel lo-a khawtlang hmasawnna tura tanrual a pawimawh thu te, India ram sawrkarin VC te chuan Own Source of Revenue lam ngai pawimawh tura a duh angina, khawtlang tana thil ṭangkai,  sum hai lut thei tur lamah ngaihtuahna an sen nasat a ṭul thu a sawi bawk. N. Mualcheng VC ten 15th FC atanga an inhlawhna  sum hlep atanga an lei, Bawlhlawh Bawm (Plastic Dust Bin) chu Mualcheng khua  Zirna In hrang hrangte hnenah a sem nghal bawk a ni.

Hrangturzo Bialtu MLA Lalmuanpuia  Punte pawhin thu sawiin N.Mualcheng khua chu khaw taima leh sawhthing pawh thar hnem khua an nih thu te, khuarel chhiatna an tawrh nasat thute a hriatpui thu sawiin, kuthnathawktute tana tangkai leh pawimawh em em tui lakna pawh Irrigation Department-in Pilot Project hmanga ruahmanna an kalpui mek thu a sawi bawk.

RGSA hnuaiah hian   Mizoram a khaw 5-te tana   'Panchayat Bhawan' sakna tur chhuak zingah , N. Mualcheng khua hian VC House sakna tur hi Rs 20 lakhs hmuin, Estimate ang chuan 26×28 tur ni mahse, VC sitting chuan an inhlawh ve na atangin 1lakhs dah belh ni se tiin, RCC Concrete-in  a dung feet 37, a vang feet 33-a liana sak a ni ta a; VC House-ah hian VC Sitting Room, VCP Room, Kitchen, Toilet leh Conference Hall-te  a awm a, a sak hna hi nikum 2025 May Ni 28 atang khan thawh tan niin, vawiinah hawn a ni ta a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannah hian DRDO Serchhip  Project Director leh DLAO ni bawk  Dr. Malsawmtluanga Fanchun leh E. Lungdar BDO Dr. Marylin Lalruatkimi te bakah  sawrkar mi pawimawh dangte, N.Mualcheng khuaa  Self Help Group member te,khawtlang hruaitute an tel a ni.

BDO chuan he danin a tum ber chu 'A vision of Viksit Bharat 2047'  tih a ni, a ti a,  kum 2047-a India zalenna champha vawi 100-na a lo thlen hun atana thingtlang mite hmasawnna leh intodelh, ram changkang nih tumna nen thlunzawm a, kum khatah ni 125 inhlawhna thingtlang a chengte tan siam leh hmasawnna ruhrel tha leh tlo din a ni, tih a sawi.  He dan thar hi July ni 1,  2026 atang India ram pumpui a hman tan tur anih avangin Block Huam chhunga VEC te pawh a scheme in a ken tel uluk taka work category leh thematic focus hrang hrang tuia intodelh, thingtlang hmasawnna ruhrel din, eizawnna ngialnghet siam leh khuarel chhiatna laka ta inven dan leh hmalakna te zir chiang a inbuatsaih turin Pu J.L alhmahruaia  chuan a chah a ni.

title: YOUNG INDIANS PARLIAMENT, 2026 ASSEMBLY SPEAKER-IN HMANPUI
content:
831/2026-2027

Aizawl, 4th June, 2026:Young Indians Mizoram buatsaih Young Indians Parliament, 2026 chu vawiin khan neih a ni a, Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Pu Vanlalzawma ex-MP chu khualzahawm a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian Pu Lalbiakzama chuan thu sawiin Young Indians, Mizoram-te'n Young Indians Parliament hun lawmawm leh chhenfakawm tak an buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, he hun hmang tura lo kal zawng zawngte chu hlawkthlak taka hmang theuh turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Khuallian chuan politics khawvelah hian India ramah kum naupangten hmun an chang tam lo hle a, kum 35 chin tan President a nih theih laiin President ni tawhte kum chawh rual chu kum 71.4 a ni a, kum 40 mi a niha Prime Minister ni thei Rajiv Gandhi bak kha chu Prime Minister naupang tak kan la nei lo bawk a, chutih rualin Mizoramah pawh thalaite hi kan lang lo hle a, kan Chief Minister neih tawhte kum chawh rual chu kum 56 vel a ni, a ti a. Ram dang ang bawkin Mizoramah hian thalaite an tam zawk hle a, nimahsela politics ngaihven lo anga sawi kan ni fo thin a. Chutiang tur ting chuan politics hi kan ralthlir thin reng em tih pawh ngaihtuah theih tak a ni a, a tam zawk hi chuan a chhunga tel emaw luhchilh kan tum lo a, kan zir chiang taima tawk lo bawk a, chuvang chuan a nawlpui hian kan ram politics sukthlek kan hre lo hle reng a, hei hi kan ngaihtuah tawk loh vang a ni a ti a. Thawkkhat lai phei kha chuan politics hi 'sual' ang thawthangah kan ngai emaw tih mai tur a ni a, Kohhran Upa leh kohhran mite tel vena tlak lo ang hiala ngaih hunlai kha a awm. Hei vang hi nge active politics kher loah pawh kan tel tha lo (passive participation) hle a, hemi kawngah hi chuan kan nu leh pate hi kan tluk lo niin a lang a. Vote thlak kawngah pawh a tam zawk hi chuan mahnia ngaih dan siam tum loin, chhungkaw thutlukna ang kan vote deuh mai mai thin niin a lang a, hei hi thil pawi tak a ni, a ti.

Khuallian chuan kan duh emaw duh lo emaw kan ram hruaitu tura kan thlan tlin apiangte kaihhruaina hnuaiah hian kan awm a ngai tho tho a, chuvangin min hruaitu tur kan thlan dawn hian ngaihtuahna kan sen a ngai a. Ram hruaitu thlanna hi 'mi lar' emaw, 'mi fel ber emaw 'kohhran hruaitu thlanna a ni lo a. "Tu hi nge ram kaihruaitu atan tha ang a, tu hian nge a ngaihna hria a, tun hian nge tuna kan dinhmun aia tha zawkah min hlang kai thei ang?" tia Mizo thalaite hian kan ram dinhmun leh kan politics kalphung hi ngun taka kan zir peih a hun tawh khawp mai a, chumi tur chuan kan nu leh pate emaw, kan pi leh pute kan beisei ngawt tur a ni lo a, "Kan kal dan pangngai hi tha kan ti," ti ringawt lo deuhin, ngaihtuahna fing leh zau zawk pu zel ila. A tul hunah chuan rilru huaisen tak puin pen chhuak ngam ila, State hmasawn zawka an kalphung kan, ban phak tawka awmte 'copy paste zelin tan la thar ila a duhawm hle mai a ti a. Tun hnai maia kan hriat lar em em social media hmang hian thu belh chian dawl lo, tlanchhe chunga mi dang beihna a la tam hle mai a, hei pawh hi ngaihtuah chian chuan a dawihzepthlakin sim a hun ta hle mai a ti bawk. Politics-ah hian insawi chhe tawn leh thu awmze nei loa inbei chiam chiam loin a kal theih a, 'issue' te khelin debate awmze neite pawh a neih theih. Chu'ng atan chuan 'policy' te sawihoin 'ideology' kan neihte phawrh tlang ila, zawi zawiin kan ram hi kan siam tha thei ang tih ka ring tlat a. Vawi leh khata sang taka invawrh a harsa tih chu kan hre theuh a, chutih rual chuan tun aia tha hi chuan kan ti thei chiang a ni. Hetiang taka politics hi kan ngaihven a nih chuan thalai fel zawk, fing zawkte a cho chhuak ngei ang tih a rinawm a, tuna politics huanga lut kum naupang zawkte hian kum upa zawkte aiin ram hruaina kawngah an hnufum loh zawk zia te, kum naupang tein ram an hruai ve thei a ni tih hi lantir thei se la chuan, thalai dangte politics huang chhungah luh duhna a neihtir ang a, mi tha leh felten ram rawngbawl duhna neiin tun ai hian ram pawhin hma a sawn zawk ngeiin a rinawm a ti bawk.

Young Indians Parliament, 2026 ah hian Pi christine L. sailo, NMT, Young Indians chuan inlawmna thu a sawi a, Mizoram Legislative Assembly official-ten Parliamentary Procedures leh inkaihhruaina dan chi hrang hrang an sawifiah a, House-a sawrkar siam dan kalphungtem house discussion te, Policy/Bill drafting briefing te neih a ni a, kalkhawmten Assembly House an tlawh bawk a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER ADDRESSES THE 73rd NEC PLENARY
content:
141/2026-2027

Aizawl, 4 June 2026:The 73rd Plenary of the North Eastern Council (NEC) was held today at the Meghalaya State Convention Centre, Shillong, under the chairmanship of Union Home Minister Shri Amit Shah, who is also the Chairman of the NEC.

During the Plenary, Mizoram Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma formally submitted the Final Report of the High-Level Task Force on the Northeast Economic Corridor (NEEC), constituted under the Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region (DoNER), to Shri Amit Shah. He also addressed the gathering on key issues relating to the development of the Northeast.

In his address, the Chief Minister stated that the Prime Minister’s Act East Policy provides a strong and visionary framework for the development of the Northeast. He observed that the region is strategically positioned to become a major driver of India’s future growth, endowed with rich natural resources, vibrant human capital and unique cultural heritage.

Among the major points highlighted by the Chief Minister were:

Connectivity should be pursued through a comprehensive “One-Grid Approach,” integrating roads, railways, air links, waterways, power, telecommunications and logistics into a coordinated development framework.

With the Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Transport Project nearing completion, the region must prepare institutionally and socially to harness emerging opportunities. He urged the Ministry of DoNER to support investment-readiness and trade-readiness programmes, skill development, entrepreneurship promotion, border infrastructure, logistics hubs and community confidence-building initiatives.

Investments should be promoted through cluster approaches rather than isolated projects. Sectors such as bamboo, agri-horticulture value chains, food processing, textiles, eco-tourism, green energy and digital services offer significant potential for inclusive growth.

Tourism should be developed through a common Northeast tourism circuit with unified branding and facilitation mechanisms.

The Northeast can emerge as a major logistics and trade gateway through the Act East Policy and the India–Myanmar–Thailand Trilateral Highway.

The mandated 10% Gross Budgetary Support (GBS) earmarked for the Northeast should be implemented effectively. He proposed the creation of a dedicated coordination mechanism under DoNER or NEC to ensure better convergence and monitoring.

The youth of the region are its most valuable resource. Greater emphasis should therefore be placed on skill development, incubation, tourism and hospitality, logistics, agribusiness, green technology and start-up ecosystems.

To accelerate project approvals under DoNER Project Implementation Units (PIUs) may be established in every State.

The Chief Minister also expressed gratitude for the recognition of Mizoram as the “Ginger Capital of India” and for the support extended to the Mizoram Ginger USP Project. He highlighted the importance of successfully implementing the proposed Thenzawl Peace City, which has the potential to emerge as a major centre for tourism, education, healthcare, sports and agro-based development.

Referring to the submission of the High-Level Task Force Report on the Northeast Economic Corridor, the Chief Minister stated that its implementation would provide a unified framework for strengthening inter-state connectivity, tourism, investments, trade and logistics across the Northeast, thereby generating shared prosperity for all the States of the region.

The 73rd NEC Plenary was attended by Union Minister for Development of North Eastern Region Shri Jyotiraditya M. Scindia, Minister of State for DoNER Dr. Sukanta Majumdar, Chief Ministers of the Northeastern States and senior government officials.

title: ECI Deputy Director Visits Reiek to Inspect Progress on SIR 2026
content:
140/2026-2027

4th June, 2026:Mr. Apurva Kumar Singh, IIS, Deputy Director of the Election Commission of India (ECI), who is currently on an official visit to Mizoram, visited Reiek today.

The ECI Deputy Director was received by the Block Development Officer (BDO) of Reiek and Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO), Ms. Betty Lalrinfeli. During the visit, he discussed the various steps taken to ensure the success of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls.

Following this, a meeting was held with Booth Level Officers (BLOs) at the AERO Office to review their progress. The Deputy Director emphasized the importance of actively showcasing their achievements and activities to the public. He instructed the BLOs to systematically collect and archive photos and videos of their field activities conducted for SIR 2026. He also encouraged the officers to utilize the influence of prominent local figures, maintain strong cooperation with community leaders, and work with dedication to ensure that no eligible Indian citizen is left out of the Electoral Roll.

After an interactive session, Mr. Singh and his entourage visited several households within Reiek village, where he personally inspected the house-to-house visits being conducted by the BLOs.

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN 73rd NEC PLENARY-AH THUSAWI
content:
828/2026-2027

Aizawl the 4th June 2026:Vawiin khan Meghalaya State Convention Centre, Shillong-ah NEC Plenary vawi 73-na Union Home Minister Pu Amit Shah, Chairman, NEC ni bawk hovin neih a ni a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Ministry of DoNER hnuaia Convener a nihna High Level Task Force on Northeast Economic Corridor (NEEC) Final Report bu chu Pu Amit Shah hnenah hian a thehlut a, thusawina hun a hmang bawk.

Chief Minister chuan, Prime Minister-in India hmarchhak bialte tana a hmathlir Act East hi a tha hle a, nakin lawka India ram hmasawnna thlentu bulpui ni thei khawpin hmarchhak bial hi a awmna a remchang a, natural resource-ah te, mipuiah te, culture lamte thlengin theihna a nei a ni, a ti.

Chief Minister thusawi langsar dangte chu:

1. Connectivity hi kan zaa mamawh thlir a “One-Grid Approach” hmanga kalpui a tha a. Kawngpui, Railway, Air link, Waterway, Power, Telecom leh logistics te hi inkungkaih takin hmasawntir theih a tha.

2. Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Transport Project hi a puitling hnai a, kawng hrang hranga kan inbuatsaih a ngai a. DoNER Ministry hian investment-readiness, trade-readiness, skill development, entrepreneurship promotion, border infrastructure leh logistics hub, community confidence-building programme-ah te hma min lakpui (support) se a tha hle.

3. Investment hi project hrang hrang kalpui thluah lovin, kan zaa mamawh thlirin a hlawm emaw a inzawmin (cluster) kalpui ila thain kan hria. Investment kalpui nana tha; Mau, Agri-Horti Value Chain, Food Processing, Textile, Eco-tourism, Green energy leh digital service-ah chutiang chuan kal ila kan zain kan chhawr tlang hle ang.

4. Tourism hi North East pumpui circuit pakhat anga common branding leh facilitation neia hmasawntir a tha berin a rinawm.

5. Trade leh logistics hi an pawimawh dan a inang reng a. Act East Policy leh India–Myanmar–Thailand Trilateral Highway hmangin North East chu logistics leh trade gateway atan siam theih a ni.

6. North East tana ruahman 10% Gross Budgetary Support (GBS) hi a hming maia kalpui lovin, tha takin kalpui thei ila. DoNER emaw NEC hnuaiah Coordination Mechanism siam ni se.

7. Kan thalaite hi kan resource pawimawh ber an ni a. Chuvangin, skill development, incubation, tourism & hospitality, logistics, agri-business, green technology leh start-up ecosystem lamah nasa zawka chher an ngai.

8. DoNER hnuaia project approval a lo chak zawk nan state tinah Project Implementation Unit din ni thei se, tih te an ni.

Pu Lalduhoma hian Mizoram chu “Ginger Capital of India” a puan a nih avang leh Mizoram Ginger USP Project a vangin lawmthu a sawi a. Thenzawl Peace City ruahman mek chu tourism, education, health, sports leh agro-based development hmunpui ni chho thei tur a nih avanga tihhlawhtlin ngei a tul thu a tarlang.

HLTF on NEEC Report a thehluh chungchang sawiin, he ruahmanna anga hmalak a nih chuan, India hmarchhak state-te inkalpawhna te, tourism te, investment te, trade and logistic te hi tum thuhmun nei takin a kal dawn a, kan hlawkpui vek dawn a ni, a ti.

73rd Plenary hi Pu Amit Shah hian a kaihruai a, DoNER Minister Pu Jyotiraditya Scindia, Minister of State for DoNER Dr. Sukanta Majumdar te leh hmarchhak state Chief Minister te leh official pawimawh tak takte an tel a ni.

Vanlalruati chuan kumin State Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day thupui - "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni" (Trees are as precious as gold, They are the foundation of all life) chu tha a tih thu sawiin rilru a hre reng turin member-te a chah a. Committee hian kumin Green Mizoram 2026-a thingtiak phunna atan Hnahthial Bypass Road chu thlangin Inauguration Function chu Johana Pa Filling Station remchang laiah neih nise tiin a rel a, khuallian atan District Bawrhsap chu nise ti a rel a ni bawk.
